Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.velocity.user

  • Constructor Details

    • VelocityConsoleUser

      public VelocityConsoleUser(Locale locale, MessageProvider provider, com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ConsoleCommandSource console)

  • Method Details

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage(@NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message)
      Description copied from interface: CommandSender
      Sends a message to the command sender. The message may be given in form of a TranslatableComponent, which will be translated to the correct language when being displayed.
      Parameters:
      message - a non-null component that represents the message to be sent.

    • sendErrorMessage

      public void sendErrorMessage()
      Description copied from interface: CommandSender
      Sends an error message to the command sender. This should be used to inform the command sender about an error that happened within the command execution, e.g. while updating data in the database. Ideally, this yields the same result as sendMessage("error.internal") content-wise, but may differ style-wise.
      See Also:
      • CommandSender.sendMessage(String, Component...)
      • MessageProvider.internalError()
      • MessageProvider.internalError(Locale)
